CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Continued To May-01-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Sarahann Shapiro, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lawrence Jackson, III, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Estate of Pearl Johnson and Estate of Adolf Johnson for the property located at 1666 Kirkwood Ave., San Franciso.
See scanned doc. for details of the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
